examples: The drive features AB's Force Technology, a field-oriented control that permits independent control of speed and torque.
For an object to be in rotational equilibrium about a certain point, the total torque about this point must be zero.
I've given it a little torque.
It has 621 bhp and 590 foot-pounds of torque from a 6-liter, direct-injection engine.
The string-back glove set will appreciate the torque-vectoring system built into the front axle.
